narrative:
Precinct Sylvania Township V (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,021 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.6%, a modest Republican lean of 5.4 percentage points.
